supported_devices: HID magnetic ballast lights, LED lights, AC fans (variable speed), heaters, coolers, humidifiers, dehumidifiers, CO2 equipment, irrigation pumps; temperature/humidity/light/CO2/pH/EC sensors (via sensor bus)
port_types: Schuko outlet (10x: 4 ballast relay, 4 general relay, 2 variable AC-fan), sensor/satellite addressing port (4x onboard, expandable to 30)
compatible_lights: HID magnetic ballast, LED (relay/timer control); dimming via light dimming output
compatible_sensors: SGC temperature/humidity/light sensor (included), optional SGC CO2, pH, EC, water sensors (addressable bus, up to 30 units)
recommended_use_note: Professional self-contained grow room computer; operates fully offline on local LAN/WiFi; browser-based interface from any device; supports up to 30 sensors and logic-gate automation rules; no cloud or subscription required
uvp_notes: Base 230V EU price; 400V 3-phase version +€20; UK socket +€30; growbox.ch lists at CHF 698
notes: Self-contained Linux ARM computer (AM335x 1GHz Cortex-A8, 512MB DDR3, 32GB SD card). 10 relay sockets: 4 for HID magnetic ballasts (up to 3600W each), 4 general-purpose (up to 3600W each), 2 variable AC-fan sockets (2×1150W with phase-controlled speed modulator 0-100%). Sensor bus supports up to 30 SGC sensors/satellites. Full privacy: no data sent to any cloud server; operates autonomously offline; optional remote access via VPN/HTTPS. Browser-based UI (Firefox/Chrome; Windows 10 recommended; MAC/Safari untested). Automation supports AND/OR/NOT/NOR/NAND/XOR/XNOR logic gates, timer (24h/weekly/monthly/yearly), and sensor threshold triggers. Email alerts for disconnections and alarms. Free version includes basic controls; Full version unlocks CO2 controller, speed controller, and advanced logic. Includes SGC Temp/Humidity/Light sensor (4m cable) and demo software. 400V 3-phase variant also available. Not sold on Amazon.de. Weight 3.65 kg (1-phase version).
